title: Senior Frontend Developer at Indifi Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Indifi Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Indifi Technologies family as a Frontend Developer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Indifi Technologies:
Indifi Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies!
